rulings.Case Title: GERALDINE HILT et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Pathology Materials For Testing
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 13, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Otis Elevator Co.¿s motion to compel pathology materials for destructive testing is granted. The pathology materials are to be produced pursuant to the language in the proposed stipulation presented by plaintiffs. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
